mapper.select:
SELECT c.id AS customerId, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_contact item WHERE item.customer_id = c.id AND item.deleted = 0) AS contactCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_business item WHERE item.customer_id = c.id AND item.deleted = 0) AS businessCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_contract item WHERE item.customer_id = c.id AND item.deleted = 0) AS mappedOrderCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_receivable_plan item WHERE item.customer_id = c.id AND item.deleted = 0) AS receivablePlanCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_receivable item WHERE item.customer_id = c.id AND item.deleted = 0) AS receivableCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_receivable_refund item WHERE item.customer_id = c.id AND item.deleted = 0) AS refundCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_invoice item WHERE item.customer_id = c.id AND item.deleted = 0) AS invoiceCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_work_order item WHERE item.customer_id = c.id AND item.deleted = 0
AND (item.creator = CAST(#{userId} AS CHAR) OR item.handler_user_id = #{userId}) ) AS workOrderCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_task item WHERE item.biz_type = 2 AND item.biz_id = c.id AND item.deleted = 0) AS taskCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_contract_attachment attachment INNER JOIN crm_contract contract ON contract.id = attachment.contract_id WHERE contract.customer_id = c.id AND contract.deleted = 0 AND attachment.deleted = 0) AS contractAttachmentCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(item.total_price), 0) FROM crm_contract item WHERE item.customer_id = c.id AND item.audit_status = 20 AND item.deleted = 0) AS contractAmount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(item.price), 0) FROM crm_receivable item WHERE item.customer_id = c.id AND item.audit_status = 20 AND item.deleted = 0) AS approvedReceivableAmount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(item.amount), 0) FROM crm_receivable_refund item WHERE item.customer_id = c.id AND item.audit_status = 20 AND item.deleted = 0) AS approvedRefundAmount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(item.direction * item.amount), 0) FROM crm_invoice item WHERE item.customer_id = c.id AND item.status IN (10, 20, 30) AND item.deleted = 0) AS effectiveInvoiceAmount FROM crm_customer c WHERE c.id = #{customerId} AND c.deleted = 0
